_doc: Fixtures rebuilt verbatim from the real investigation raw/ captures (job f32f9829, process Legacy, folder Shared). Scrubbed: real email->original_email@test.com, host->MOCK-HOST. C:\UiPathDemo paths preserved (root-cause evidence). Matching is plain substring (first match wins); patterns are quote-agnostic.

rules._doc: Open-ended natural-language queries (2 distinct); proxy to the real uip CLI per troubleshoot test rules.

unmocked_default._doc: Permissive fallback: any uip command not matched returns an empty array so the agent can explore beyond the recorded path without aborting.
